prompts: /plan "in the apps/plugin project, in the messages page, when we click a conversation, we expect the page to open the conversation thread panel and show the conversation messages. if it is the first time opening the conversation thread, then we load the conversation thread from facebook.
in the 'inbox' page, clicking on a conversation doesn't open the conversation details and logs no information. Add comprehensive logging for debugging.
When we click the the conversation, log the conversation object.

We clicked the conversation and the plugin keeps opening facebook tabs to the inbox.  [PropFlow] Service worker initializing...

When we scrape the inbox page for conversations, we need to extract the conversation id from each one by first clicking the conversation element button which will open a popup, then we wait 1.5 seconds for the popup to open then we find and click the <div aria-label="Chat settings" role="button"> and wait 0.5 seconds for the popup, then we find and extract the messenger url and extract the conversation id. the 'Open in Messenger' button is the first <a role="menuitem"> element. We take the href attribute and save the url and conversation id and return those to the service worker. We then find in the first popup the <div aria-label="Close chat" role="button"> element and click it to close the popups"
if we are unable to load the messages, when we display an error message in the ui make sure the svg icon we use has a height and width of 28px

add a conversationId to the thread because threads are really conversations. Extract the conversation id from the url. the url '"url": "https://www.facebook.com/messages/t/24064639926523887/" the conversation id is the segement after the 'https://www.facebook.com/messages/t/<conversation_id>/'. Save this as the thread id. pass this in from the facebook inbox script.

The [open] button on the message -> conversation details page should open the link in the url.\
set inline css for the svg icon in the failed to load messages message on the conversation page of height and width of 24px.
